paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc. is currently 6.58, with a decrease of 1.05% from the prior close and 24.28% over the last 21 trading sessions. The price is as of July 22, 2026.

There have been no new news headlines in the last 24 hours, but a recent news article from The Globe and Mail reported on the resignation of a Fermi Inc. director amid a governance dispute. This event is also reflected in recent SEC filings, including an 8-K filing on July 21 and another on July 13, which disclose the director's resignation due to a disagreement over access to company books and records.

Recent SEC filings also include an 8-K filing on July 15, which reports the issuance of $431.25 million in aggregate principal amount of 5.00% convertible senior notes due 2031, and a SCHEDULE 13G filing on July 20. Additionally, there has been one Form 4 filing and four new social posts in the last 24 hours, including a post about the arrival of Siemens turbines at the Port of Houston.
